creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Hi, Your patch is causing plist issues:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%WWWDIR%%/index.html
Error: Orphaned: %%WWWDIR%%/lists/config/config.php.sample
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %WWWDIR%%/index.htmdex.htmll
Error: Missing: %%WWWDIR%%/lists/config/config.php
===> Error: Plist issues found.
